GD3a_gradcheck.note: the in-run two-eps real-FD check hit its roundoff floor (4.4e-6 at eps 1e-6, 1.3e-4 at 1e-5); the energy is polynomial in M so the gate was upgraded to complex-step (machine-exact, cancellation-free) and re-run on the same state: 1.75e-15 PASS. Gate code on disk = complex-step (try 3 of cap 3).
